# Animal Module

## Introduction

### Example of a Figure

This is a great example of how to set up a module. 

<!-- #fig-animal-icon is how the code adds figures to TOC, like a label -->
![Animal module icon](resources/animal.png){#fig-animal-icon width=35%}

### Example of a Table

| Variable | Definition |
|---|---|
| heiferI_num | Number of Heifer I animals |

: Example animal inputs {#tbl-animal-inputs}

### Examples of Equations

$$
CBW = MW * 0.06275 \qquad \text{(AN.NRC.2)}
$$ {#eq-an-nrc-2}

$$
CBW = MW * 0.06275 \qquad \text{(AN.NRC.3)}
$$ {#eq-an-nrc-3}

$$
CBW = MW * 0.06275 \qquad \text{(AN.NRC.4)}
$$ {#eq-an-nrc-4}

$$
CBW = MW * 0.06275 \qquad \text{(AN.NRC.5)}
$$ {#eq-an-nrc-5}

$$
CBW = MW * 0.06275 \qquad \text{(AN.NRC.1)}
$$ {#eq-an-nrc-1}

$$
CBW = MW * 0.06275 \qquad \text{(AN.NRC.6)}
$$ {#eq-an-nrc-6}

See @eq-an-nrc-2.
